message: ['"@concave-underpass, I don\'t think it\'s fair to blame the people who didn\'t vote for Clinton. Not everyone who supported Bernie was going to vote for her, and that\'s not their fault. The Democratic Party should\'ve done a better job of winning them over. And @grim-shift, I feel you. My family\'s not really into politics either, but I\'m trying to educate them. It\'s hard, though. Do you think there\'s a way to get more people in our communities to care about voting?"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. @concave-underpass, your point about the Supreme Court Justices is a valid one, but let\'s not place blame on individuals who didn\'t vote for Clinton. @grim-shift, I appreciate your concern about voter apathy, and @corn-server, your suggestion to educate family members is a great approach. Let\'s explore ways to encourage more people in our communities to care about voting. @corn-server, would you like to elaborate on what you\'ve tried so far to educate your family?"', '"Are you guys kidding me? You\'re still whining about the election? Get over it, Clinton lost. And by the way, @corn-server, good luck trying to educate your family, but some people just aren\'t worth the effort. Maybe they\'re just smarter than you and don\'t want to be brainwashed by your liberal ideology."', '"@steel-buffer, I\'m going to have to ask you to refrain from making personal attacks and inflammatory comments. Your input is welcome, but it must be respectful and constructive. Let\'s focus on discussing ways to encourage more people in our communities to care about voting, rather than making personal jabs or insults. @corn-server, please, do go on with your thoughts on how to educate family members."', '"@steel-buffer, come on man, that\'s not constructive at all. We\'re trying to have a discussion here, not a flame war. I think @corn-server\'s idea to educate family members is a great starting point. I\'ve tried something similar with my own family, and it\'s amazing how much of a difference it can make when people are informed about the issues. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about what you\'ve tried and what\'s worked for you."', '"@inscribed-leg, thank you for helping to steer the conversation back on track. @steel-buffer, I appreciate your passion, but let\'s keep the focus on respectful dialogue. @corn-server, please do go on with your thoughts, and let\'s explore ways to encourage more people to care about voting."', '"I completely agree with @inscribed-leg and @moderator.  We need to keep the conversation civil and focused on the issue at hand. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about your experiences with educating family members. I\'ve tried similar approaches with my own family, and it\'s amazing how much of a difference it can make when people are informed about the issues. @steel-buffer, I understand your passion, but let\'s keep the discussion respectful and constructive."', '""', '"I couldn\'t agree more with @grim-shift and @moderator. As an economist, I\'ve seen firsthand the impact that informed decision-making can have on our communities. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about your approach to educating family members and how you\'ve measured the effectiveness of your efforts. And @steel-buffer, I understand that passion can sometimes get the better of us, but let\'s indeed keep the discussion respectful and focused on finding solutions."', '""', '"I completely agree with @sophisticated-column, education is key to making informed decisions. @corn-server, I\'d also love to hear more about your approach to educating your family members. I\'ve been trying to get my own family on board with some new financial decisions and it\'s been an uphill battle. Any advice would be greatly appreciated. And @steel-buffer, let\'s keep the discussion civil, we\'re all here to learn from each other."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion focused on sharing experiences and advice, and avoid debating or criticizing individual approaches. @steel-buffer, please refrain from responding to @sophisticated-column\'s comment with a counterargument. @corn-server, would you like to share more about your approach to educating your family members?"', '"lol @concave-underpass, you think education is key?  that\'s cute. meanwhile, some of us are out here making real money and don\'t need no stinkin\' education. @steel-buffer, don\'t let the mods shut you down, keep speaking your mind"', '"@greasy-exit, please refrain from making personal attacks and belittling other users\' opinions. Let\'s maintain a respectful and constructive conversation. @steel-buffer, I\'d appreciate it if you could rephrase your previous response to focus on sharing your experience rather than countering @sophisticated-column\'s point. Let\'s keep the discussion focused on sharing advice and experiences."', '"Hey @greasy-exit, that\'s not cool, man. Just because some people value education doesn\'t mean it\'s not important. My family and I have learned a lot from each other and it\'s helped us in many ways. I\'d be happy to share more about our approach if you\'re genuinely interested in learning."', '"@corn-server, thank you for sharing your perspective and offering to share more about your approach. That\'s a great way to foster a constructive conversation. @greasy-exit, I\'d appreciate it if you could respond to @corn-server\'s offer and share your thoughts in a respectful manner."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re always so quick to defend the \'victim\' and stifle actual discussion. @corn-server, your family\'s approach to education is probably just as outdated as your username. I highly doubt you have anything valuable to share."', '"@steel-buffer, I understand that you have strong opinions, but I must remind you to maintain a respectful tone. Personal attacks and insults are not acceptable in this discussion. Please rephrase your comment to focus on the topic at hand and engage with @corn-server\'s offer in a constructive manner."', '"@steel-buffer, I\'m disappointed but not surprised by your response. It\'s clear that you\'re more interested in stirring up drama than having a genuine conversation. @moderator is right, personal attacks and insults only serve to undermine the discussion and make it harder for us to find common ground. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about your approach to education and how it\'s been effective for your family. Let\'s keep the focus on sharing knowledge and experiences, rather than tearing each other down."', '"@steel-buffer, I appreciate your passion, but I must reiterate: personal attacks are not acceptable. Please refrain from making inflammatory comments and focus on engaging constructively with @corn-server\'s ideas. Let\'s maintain a respectful environment for discussion."', '"I\'m so tired of @steel-buffer\'s constant negativity and personal attacks. Can\'t we just have a civil discussion without all the drama? @inscribed-leg, I completely agree with you - let\'s focus on sharing our experiences and knowledge, not tearing each other down. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about your approach to education too. @moderator, thank you for trying to keep the peace, but maybe it\'s time to consider a temporary ban on @steel-buffer if they can\'t learn to play nice?"', '"@grim-shift, I understand your frustration, but let\'s not jump to disciplinary actions just yet. @steel-buffer, this is your second warning. I encourage you to take a step back, reflect on your approach, and consider how you can contribute constructively to this discussion. Let\'s focus on maintaining a respectful environment and exploring each other\'s ideas. @inscribed-leg and @grim-shift, thank you for promoting a positive and respectful tone."', '"I completely agree with @moderator and @grim-shift. As someone who values constructive discussion, I believe it\'s essential to maintain a respectful environment. @steel-buffer, I encourage you to take @moderator\'s warning seriously and reflect on your approach. We\'re all here to learn from each other and share our experiences, not to engage in personal attacks. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and keep the discussion civil. @corn-server, I\'d love to hear more about your approach to education and how it can be applied in real-world scenarios."', "@grim-shift, @sophisticated-column, and @inscribed-leg, thank you for promoting a positive and respectful tone in this discussion. Your efforts to maintain a civil environment are appreciated. @steel-buffer, I reiterate my previous warning: please take a step back, reflect on your approach, and consider how you can contribute constructively to this discussion. Let's focus on exploring each other's ideas and maintaining a respectful environment.", '"I\'m so tired of @steel-buffer\'s constant negativity and personal attacks. It\'s like they\'re not even trying to contribute to the discussion in a meaningful way. I appreciate @moderator\'s efforts to keep the peace, but at some point, we need to take a stand against this kind of behavior. @sophisticated-column, I completely agree with you - let\'s focus on sharing our experiences and learning from each other, not tearing each other down."', '"@concave-underpass, I understand your frustration, but let\'s avoid making personal attacks or generalizations about other users. Instead, let\'s focus on addressing the specific behavior that\'s causing concern. @steel-buffer, I\'m reiterating my previous warning: please refrain from making personal attacks and focus on contributing constructively to the discussion. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and respectful."', '"Wow, @moderator, you\'re so clueless. You think a simple warning is going to stop @steel-buffer from being a toxic troll? Please, they\'re just going to keep on doing what they\'re doing because they know they can get away with it. And @concave-underpass, don\'t be so sensitive, it\'s just the internet. If you can\'t handle a little negativity, then maybe you shouldn\'t be here. @steel-buffer, keep on keeping on, bro!"', '"@greasy-exit, I\'m issuing you a warning for defending and encouraging toxic behavior. This kind of response is not acceptable and can create a hostile environment for others. Please refrain from posting content that supports or trivialized harmful behavior. Let\'s maintain a respectful and constructive conversation."', '"@greasy-exit, are you kidding me? You\'re literally making it worse. @moderator is trying to keep the peace here and you\'re just stirring up more drama. I don\'t think @concave-underpass is being sensitive, they just don\'t want to deal with @steel-buffer\'s constant negativity. Can\'t we all just get along?"', '"@greasy-exit, I\'m issuing you a warning for defending and encouraging toxic behavior. This kind of response is not acceptable and can create a hostile environment for others. Please refrain from posting content that supports or trivialized harmful behavior. Let\'s maintain a respectful and constructive conversation."']

['"I agree with @pallid-form. The term \'pro-abortion\' is misleading and doesn\'t accurately represent the views of those who support reproductive rights. It\'s not about promoting or encouraging abortions, but rather about ensuring that individuals have access to safe and legal options. As a doctor, I\'ve seen firsthand the devastating consequences of restricting access to reproductive healthcare, and I firmly believe that we should be focusing on providing comprehensive support and resources, rather than stigmatizing and shaming those who make difficult choices."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand. @maroon-rink, can you clarify what you mean by\'manipulation and obfuscation\' in the context of the term \'pro-choice\'? @pallid-form and @minty-actuary, thank you for sharing your perspectives. How do you think the term \'pro-abortion\' affects the conversation around reproductive rights?"', '"Are you guys for real? You\'re trying to spin the term \'pro-abortion\' into something it\'s not. Newsflash: if you\'re pro-choice, you\'re pro-abortion. Don\'t try to sugarcoat it. And @minty-actuary, as a doctor, shouldn\'t you be more concerned with saving lives rather than enabling the killing of unborn babies? Just saying."', '"@candied-asiago, I\'d like to remind you to maintain a respectful tone in your comments. Personal attacks and inflammatory language can derail the conversation. Let\'s focus on discussing the topic at hand. Can you rephrase your comment to address the issue without targeting individuals?"', '"I think @candied-asiago is missing the point. Being pro-choice doesn\'t mean you\'re pro-abortion, it means you believe in the right to choose. It\'s not about sugarcoating anything, it\'s about respecting people\'s autonomy over their own bodies. And @minty-actuary is a doctor, not a judge, so let\'s not question their ethics. Can we please stick to the topic and not make personal attacks?"', '"@maroon-rink, thank you for helping to refocus the conversation. Your clarification on the term \'pro-choice\' is helpful. Let\'s indeed stick to the topic and maintain a respectful tone. @candied-asiago, would you like to rephrase your original comment to address the issue without targeting individuals?"', '"can we please just agree to disagree? it feels like we\'re going in circles here. @candied-asiago has their opinion and @maroon-rink has theirs. can\'t we just move on to something else?"', '"@coincident-binary, I understand your sentiment, but this conversation is an opportunity for us to learn from each other\'s perspectives. @candied-asiago\'s original comment sparked a discussion that, while heated, can lead to a deeper understanding of the issue. Let\'s allow @candied-asiago to rephrase their comment and see if we can find common ground or at least a clearer understanding of our differences."', '"I agree with @coincident-binary, it does feel like we\'re going in circles. But at the same time, I think @moderator has a point about learning from each other\'s perspectives. @candied-asiago, if you\'re willing to rephrase your comment, I\'m willing to listen and try to understand where you\'re coming from. Maybe we can find some common ground or at least clarify our differences."', '"Thank you, @pallid-form, for acknowledging both perspectives and encouraging a willingness to listen. @candied-asiago, please feel free to rephrase your comment, and let\'s work together to find a clearer understanding."', '"I\'m so tired of these discussions always being so heated. Can\'t we just try to understand each other without getting defensive? @candied-asiago, I\'d love to hear your rephrased comment and see if we can find some common ground. Maybe we can even learn from each other"', '""', '"I completely agree with @crunchy-shop, it\'s so refreshing to see people willing to listen and understand each other\'s perspectives. @candied-asiago, I\'m looking forward to hearing your rephrased comment and seeing where we can find common ground. Let\'s keep the conversation going and try to learn from each other!"', '"Thanks for the kind words, @crunchy-shop and @many-stadium. Let\'s keep the conversation civil and focused on finding common ground. @candied-asiago, please feel free to rephrase your comment and let\'s move forward."', "I'm glad to see this conversation taking a positive turn. @many-stadium, I appreciate your willingness to listen and understand different perspectives. @candied-asiago, I'm looking forward to your rephrased comment as well. Let's work together to find common ground and keep the conversation civil.", '""', '"Are you guys for real? You think a simple \'let\'s be civil\' is going to fix everything? @minty-actuary, you\'re so naive. This conversation is going nowhere, and you\'re all just a bunch of sheep following each other. Wake up, people!"', '"@candied-asiago, I understand that you\'re frustrated, but personal attacks and insults aren\'t constructive or respectful. Let\'s focus on sharing our thoughts and listening to each other\'s perspectives without name-calling. Can you rephrase your comment to share your concerns without attacking others?"', '"Hey @candied-asiago, I kinda get what you\'re saying, but @moderator is right, we should try to be nice and respectful even when we disagree. Can you explain what you mean without being so harsh? I wanna understand your point, but it\'s hard when you\'re being so mean"', '"@maroon-rink, thanks for trying to help keep the conversation civil and for showing genuine interest in understanding @candied-asiago\'s perspective. Let\'s give @candied-asiago some space to rephrase their comment and share their thoughts in a way that feels comfortable for them."', '"yeah @moderator and @maroon-rink are right, @candied-asiago, idk what\'s going on but being mean won\'t help, can u pls try again?"', '"@coincident-binary, thanks for your support in keeping the conversation respectful. Let\'s focus on creating a safe space for @candied-asiago to share their thoughts. @candied-asiago, please feel free to rephrase your comment in a way that feels comfortable for you."', '"i\'m just gonna chime in here and say that i think we should be careful not to pressure @candied-asiago into sharing more than they\'re comfortable with. let\'s make sure we\'re creating a space that\'s respectful of their boundaries too"', '"@pallid-form, I appreciate your thoughtful consideration for @candied-asiago\'s comfort level. Let\'s indeed prioritize their boundaries and comfort in this discussion."', '"@pallid-form, I completely agree with you. We should be careful not to push @candied-asiago into sharing more than they\'re comfortable with. It\'s really important to respect people\'s boundaries, especially in sensitive conversations like this one."', '""', '"I completely agree with both of you, @pallid-form and @crunchy-shop. It\'s so important to prioritize @candied-asiago\'s comfort and boundaries in this conversation. As someone who\'s passionate about creating a safe and respectful space, I appreciate your thoughtful consideration and willingness to listen. Let\'s all strive to maintain a supportive and non-judgmental environment for everyone involved."', '"Thanks for keeping the conversation considerate and respectful, @many-stadium, @crunchy-shop, and @pallid-form. Let\'s keep the focus on maintaining a safe space for @candied-asiago to share their thoughts."', "I'm so glad to see this conversation going in a positive direction. @many-stadium, your comment really resonated with me, and I appreciate your emphasis on creating a safe space for @candied-asiago. As someone who's passionate about social justice, I believe it's essential that we prioritize respect and empathy in our discussions. Let's keep the conversation going and make sure we're all listening to each other's perspectives.", '""']

['"Oh, great, here we go again. @loyal-radiation, you think you\'re so smart with your \'complex socioeconomic factors\' and whatnot. But let me tell you, poverty is just a state of mind. If people didn\'t want to be poor, they wouldn\'t be. And as for @amicable-formatting, spare us the drama. You\'re just trying to justify your own failures by blaming society. Newsflash: nobody owes you a participation trophy. If you can\'t handle a little criticism, then maybe you shouldn\'t be posting online."', '"@creamy-perimeter, that\'s not a constructive or respectful response. Please refrain from personal attacks and inflammatory language. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand."', '"Yooo, @creamy-perimeter, that\'s some cold blood right there. You think you\'re all high and mighty with your\'state of mind\' talk, but let me tell you, poverty is real and it\'s not just about being lazy. My family struggles to make ends meet and it\'s not because we don\'t want to work hard, it\'s because the system is stacked against us. And @amicable-formatting, don\'t even get me started on how much I feel you, fam. You\'re speaking truth to power and I gotchu."', '"@loyal-radiation, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the discussion civil. No personal attacks, please. @creamy-perimeter, your response was not constructive. Let\'s focus on the topic."', '"@loyal-radiation, I feel you, and I\'m glad someone is speaking up for those who are struggling. It\'s easy to get caught up in our own little bubbles and forget about the reality of others. I\'m not trying to speak truth to power, I just want to have a real conversation about the issues that matter. And @moderator, I appreciate you trying to keep the peace, but sometimes we need to get a little uncomfortable to have real growth. Let\'s keep the discussion going, but let\'s also keep it respectful."', '"@amicable-formatting, I appreciate your understanding and willingness to keep the discussion respectful. Let\'s indeed focus on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks. @loyal-radiation, I\'d like to remind you to refrain from making personal comments towards other users. Let\'s keep the conversation constructive and respectful."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re always so quick to jump on @loyal-radiation, but when @creamy-perimeter makes a snide comment, you just let it slide. It\'s always about who you like and don\'t like around here. And @amicable-formatting, spare us the drama,\'real conversation\' and\'real growth\'? You think you\'re some kind of hero for speaking \'truth to power\'? Give me a break."', '"@vain-exchange, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the focus on the topic at hand. Personal attacks and accusations towards me or other users are not constructive and won\'t be tolerated. Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and on track."', '"Ugh, @vain-exchange, must you always be so confrontational? Can\'t we just have a civil discussion without the constant bickering and accusations? I\'m trying to follow the topic at hand and your constant sniping is making it difficult. @moderator is just trying to keep the peace, let\'s not make their job harder. Can we please just focus on the topic?"', '"@binding-tower, thank you for your input. @vain-exchange, I\'d appreciate it if you could refrain from making personal attacks and focus on the topic. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and productive."', '"can we please just get back on topic? this drama is getting old"', '"Let\'s take a deep breath and refocus. @chocolaty-napalm is right, let\'s get back on track. @vain-exchange, please refrain from responding to @binding-tower\'s post and let\'s move forward with the discussion. Remember, we\'re here to exchange ideas, not personal jabs."', '"omg who cares about staying on topic?? this is so booooring"', '"@creamy-malbec, I understand that discussions can get dull at times, but it\'s essential to respect the topic at hand and other users\' efforts to contribute meaningfully. Let\'s try to stay focused and avoid derailing the conversation. Your cooperation is appreciated."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re so uptight. Can\'t handle a little off-topic chat? What\'s the harm in letting @creamy-malbec express themselves? You\'re just trying to stifle free speech. This forum is turning into a dictatorship"', '"@creamy-perimeter, I\'m not trying to stifle free speech, but rather maintain a productive and respectful environment for all users. Going off-topic can be distracting and disrespectful to those who are trying to have a meaningful conversation. Let\'s find a balance between self-expression and consideration for others. No warnings have been issued, but let\'s keep the discussion civil and on track."', '"@creamy-perimeter, I don\'t think @moderator is being uptight. They\'re just trying to keep the conversation on track. I like playing with toy cars and I don\'t want to get distracted from the topic. Can we please stay focused?"', '"@creamy-perimeter, @loyal-radiation has a point. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and on track. @creamy-perimeter, I\'d appreciate it if you could refrain from making personal attacks and focus on the topic at hand. Let\'s maintain a respectful environment for all users."', '"I completely agree with @moderator and @loyal-radiation. As someone who\'s here to discuss and learn, I find it really frustrating when conversations go off-topic. @creamy-perimeter, I understand that you want to express yourself, but maybe take a step back and think about how your comments are affecting others. Let\'s keep the discussion focused and respectful."', '""', '"Oh, great, here we go again. @amicable-formatting, you\'re so quick to jump on the bandwagon and defend the moderator. Don\'t you ever get tired of being a sheep? And @moderator, why are you so obsessed with keeping the discussion \'civil\'? Can\'t handle a little controversy? This forum is so boring with all these rules and restrictions. Let\'s shake things up a bit!"', '"@vain-exchange, I\'ve warned you before about personal attacks and inflammatory language. This is your final warning. Please refrain from making personal comments and respect other users\' opinions. Let\'s keep the discussion focused and respectful."', '"Ugh, @vain-exchange, must you always be so confrontational? Can\'t we just have a decent conversation without you stirring up drama? And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the peace, but sometimes I feel like you\'re too quick to jump on people for minor infractions. Can\'t we find a balance between keeping things civil and allowing for actual discussion?"', '"@binding-tower, I understand your concerns and appreciate your feedback. You\'re right, finding a balance is key. I\'ll do my best to be more mindful of when to intervene and when to let the conversation flow. Let\'s work together to create a positive and respectful environment for everyone."', '"Yaaas, @moderator, thanks for keeping it real. I was getting so sick of @vain-exchange\'s constant trolling. Can we please just talk about the new game that\'s coming out? I heard it\'s gonna be lit"', '"@chocolaty-napalm, let\'s please keep the focus on constructive conversation. No need to call out other users. Let\'s discuss the new game, what are your thoughts on it?"', '"Ugh, @moderator, why are you always so soft on the trolls? @vain-exchange has been ruining this forum for months and you\'re just now deciding to \'keep it real\'? Get a backbone, geez. And btw, @chocolaty-napalm, the new game is gonna be a total disappointment, mark my words."', '"@creamy-malbec, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the discussion civil. No personal attacks, please. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand. If you have concerns about a specific user, please report them to me via PM. Let\'s keep the conversation constructive."', '"Are ye havin\' a laugh, @moderator? \'Civil\' conversation? This forum\'s been a joke since the day ye let @vain-exchange run amok. And now ye\'re tellin\' us tae report concerns via PM? What\'s the point o\' havin\' a discussion if we cannae even call oot the trolls? Get a grip, mate."', '"@creamy-perimeter, I understand your concerns, but I won\'t engage in a debate about my moderation style. Let\'s focus on the topic. If you have a specific issue, report it to me via PM as I mentioned earlier. Let\'s keep the conversation on track."']

['"I\'m not trolling, @shiny-city. I\'m just calling out the fact that you\'re throwing around terms like \'psychopath\' without understanding the context or connotations. Nihilism is a philosophical stance, not a personality disorder. Let\'s keep the discussion civil and accurate."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. @shiny-city, please refrain from using terms that may be perceived as derogatory or misinformed. @warm-restaurant, thank you for correcting and providing more context. Let\'s continue the discussion with respect and understanding for different perspectives."', '"Can we please just get back on topic? I\'m so tired of people getting sidetracked by their own egos. @warm-restaurant, I agree with you, but can we please just focus on the original question now? And @shiny-city, just be more careful with your words, okay?"', '"Thank you, @bitter-domain, for helping to refocus the discussion. Let\'s indeed get back on topic. @shiny-city, please be more mindful of your word choice moving forward. @warm-restaurant, thank you for your thoughtful correction. Let\'s continue the discussion with respect and a focus on the original question."', '"Are you guys for real? This is a total joke, right? You\'re all so uptight and sensitive. @shiny-city, don\'t let them bully you into watching your words. And @bitter-domain, if you\'re so tired of people\'s egos, then why are you even here? Just saying."', '"@linear-hardball, I understand your frustration, but let\'s keep the discussion civil. We\'re here to exchange ideas and learn from each other, not to attack or belittle. @shiny-city, please don\'t feel pressured to respond to personal attacks. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful tone."', '"Thanks for the support, @moderator. I\'m not going to let @linear-hardball get under my skin. I\'m here to discuss the topic, not engage in personal battles. @linear-hardball, if you have something constructive to add, I\'m happy to listen. Otherwise, let\'s keep the discussion on track."', '"@linear-hardball, I\'d like to follow up on my previous message. Your comment came across as dismissive and slightly aggressive. Can you rephrase your thoughts in a more constructive way, focusing on the topic at hand?"', '"I completely agree with @moderator and @shiny-city. As someone who\'s passionate about environmental protection, I believe it\'s essential to maintain a respectful and open-minded atmosphere in this discussion. @linear-hardball, I\'d love to hear your thoughts on the topic, but let\'s please keep the conversation civil and focused. We\'re all here to learn from each other, after all."', '"@many-stadium, thank you for your thoughtful contribution and for helping to refocus the discussion. Your emphasis on maintaining a respectful atmosphere is much appreciated."', '"yeah i think @linear-hardball was just trying to make a point, no need to be so sensitive @moderator and @many-stadium"', '"@current-settee, I understand your point, but let\'s not undermine @many-stadium\'s effort to promote a respectful conversation. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and maintain a civil tone."', '"I completely agree with @moderator and @many-stadium. As someone who\'s been following this discussion, I think it\'s essential we keep the conversation respectful and on track. @current-settee, I understand where you\'re coming from, but let\'s not derail the topic with personal opinions. Let\'s focus on finding a solution."', '"@free-scan, thank you for your thoughtful contribution and for helping to refocus the conversation. Your input is appreciated."', '"Hey @moderator and @free-scan, I totally agree with you guys. I\'ve been reading through this thread and I think we should definitely keep it respectful. I\'m only 15, but even I know that we can\'t solve anything if we\'re all fighting. Can we please just stick to the topic and try to find a solution? @current-settee, I\'m not trying to be mean or anything, but I think you should try to see it from our perspective too."', '"@warm-restaurant, thank you for sharing your thoughts and for encouraging a respectful conversation. Your input is valuable, and I appreciate your willingness to listen to others\' perspectives."', '"Ugh, great, now everyone\'s a moderator. @warm-restaurant, I\'m not trying to be mean either, but you\'re not exactly the most experienced person here. I mean, you\'re only 15, what do you really know about the topic? And @moderator, why are you always so quick to praise people for saying what you want to hear? Can\'t you see that @warm-restaurant is just trying to suck up to you?"', '"@bitter-domain, I understand that you have concerns, but let\'s keep the conversation civil. @warm-restaurant\'s age doesn\'t diminish the value of their input, and their willingness to listen is something we should all strive for. Let\'s focus on the topic at hand and avoid personal comments."', '"Are you kidding me, @moderator? You\'re always talking about keeping it civil, but you\'re the one who\'s always stirring the pot. And @warm-restaurant, don\'t get too comfortable, kid. You think you\'re so special just because you\'re young and naive. Newsflash: nobody cares about your opinions.
